MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HIRO_ATTACK.title: Strike
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_ONE.description: Gain {PerjuryPower:diff()} [red]Perjury[/red], return 1 card from your discard pile to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_ONE.title: Card One
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_ONE.selectionScre: Choose 1 card to return to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWO.title: Card Two
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWO.description: At end of turn, trigger [red]Justice[/red]'s healing effect 1 extra time.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FOUR.title: Card Four
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FIVE.title: Card Five
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FIVE.description: Spend all [red]Justice[/red]. Attack random enemies that many times for {Damage:diff()} damage.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SIX.title: Card Six
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SIX.description: Draw cards equal to your [red]Perjury[/red]. Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} equal to your [red]Justice[/red].
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SEVEN.title: Card Seven
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_EIGHT.title: Card Eight
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TEN.title: Card Ten
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_ELEVEN.title: Card Eleven
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_ELEVEN.descriptio: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. You may Exhaust up to {Cards:diff()} cards to gain that much [red]Perjury[/red].
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWELVE.descriptio: Gain 6 Strength, 5 Dexterity, and 9 Perjury this turn.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FOURTEEN.title: Card Fourteen
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FIFTEEN.title: Card Fifteen
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_FIFTEEN.descripti: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [red]Justice[/red].
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SIXTEEN.title: Card Sixteen
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SIXTEEN.descripti: Draw until you draw an Attack. Gain [red]Perjury[/red] equal to the number of cards drawn.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SEVEN_TEEN.title: Card Seventeen
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_SEVEN_TEEN.descri:
Gain 1 [red]Justice[/red]. Return this to your hand when you gain 4 [red]Perjury[/red]{IfUpgraded:show:
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.|}
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_EIGHTEEN.title: Card Eighteen
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_EIGHTEEN.descript: Spend {PerjuryPower:diff()} [red]Perjury[/red]. Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Return this to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY.title: Card Twenty
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY.descriptio: Whenever [red]Perjury[/red] converts into [red]Justice[/red], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw 1 card.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_ONE.title: Card Twenty-One
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_ONE.descri: Spend {JusticePower:diff()} [red]Justice[/red] and {PerjuryPower:diff()} [red]Perjury[/red]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, reduce {StrengthPower:diff()} Strength, and return this next turn.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DEATH_REWIND.title: Death Rewind
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DEATH_REWIND.descripti:
[b]Magic[/b]
[red][fade_in]"Is this... a [b]rewind[/b]? To me, this is unforgivable. To me, this is wrong."[/fade_in][/red]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HIRO_DEFEND.title: Defend
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_MENTAL_TRAUMA.title: Mental Trauma
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_TWO.title: Card Twenty-Two
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_FOUR.descr: On turns where Perjury converts into Justice, damage you take cannot exceed {CardTwentyFourPower:diff()}.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_SEVEN.sele: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards to return to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_SEVEN.desc: Return {Cards:diff()} cards from your Exhaust pile to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_EIGHT.desc: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Choose {Cards:diff()} cards, then gain {PerjuryPower:diff()} [red]Perjury[/red].
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_EIGHT.sele: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards to put into your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_JUSTICE.description:
[red][b]"My wish is only one thing... to meet everyone again. For that... I will save everyone."[/b][/red]
Create a [red]Save[/red] that gives a chosen teammate 100 [red]Justice[/red], gain 100 [b]Witchification[/b], gain 2 [b]Ritual Ceremony[/b], choose and play 3 Attacks from your piles for free and gain Block equal to damage dealt, then next turn gain 3 [red]Justice[/red], 3 Energy, and draw 3 cards.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_JUSTICE.title: Justice
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_JUSTICE.selectionScree: Choose 3 Attack cards to play and gain Block equal to the damage dealt.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SAVE.title: Save
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_SIX.title: Card Twenty-Six
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_SIX.descri: Gain 3 Perjury, deal 4 damage, gain 5 Witchification.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_FIVE.title: Card Twenty-Five
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CARD_TWENTY_FIVE.descr:
Discard all cards in your hand.
For each card discarded, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:CardTwentySix+|CardTwentySix}[/gold] to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HIRO_WITH.title: Witch Power
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HIRO_WITH.description:
[red][b]"Ah, so you were with me all along..."[/b][/red]
Usable at 100 [b]Witchification[/b]. Gain 1 [b]Ritual Ceremony[/b], gain 2 Intangible, and double your damage next turn.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_AAM.title: Ama's Guardian
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_AAM.description: Gain 3 [b]Suspect[/b]. Choose an enemy, replace its move, then choose an ally as the new target.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_MARK.title: Witch Mark
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_MARK.description:
[b]Retain[/b]
At end of turn, if in hand, gain {WithPower:diff()} [b]Witchification[/b]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_BURN.title: Witch Burn
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_BURN.description:
Returns to hand at start of turn
At end of turn, deals {Damage} damage to self
[b]Retain[/b]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NYM_SLASH.title: Noah Slash
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_REVOKATION.title: Revokation
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_REVOKATION.description:
Lose 3 Max HP. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose 1 [red]Death Rewind[/red] from draw pile, discard pile, or hand to Exhaust. Remove your [red]Death Rewind[/red] power.
If a card was Exhausted or power removed, add a [b]Retain[/b] [red]Justice[/red] to hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ELEVATOR_TRIAL.title: Elevator Trial - Endless Fall
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ELEVATOR_TRIAL.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[red]Endless Fall[/red]: After playing, shuffle into draw pile. Each time played this combat, damage +{RecursionDamage:diff()}.
Exhaust 1 random non-Attack card from hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_CHAOS.title: Witch Frenzy - Friendly Fire
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_CHAOS.descriptio:
Attack random enemies or allies {HitCount:diff()} times for {Damage:diff()} damage (unaffected by Strength or Witchification).
On enemy hit: randomly apply [red]Suspect[/red], [b]Weak[/b], Aam's Magic, Lym's Magic, or Noah's Magic.
On ally hit: randomly gain Merruru's, Mgm's, Shirley's, Hannah's, Noah's, Coco's, Nyx's, Emma's, or Arisa's Magic.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SUSPECT_SPREAD.title: Suspect Spread
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SUSPECT_SPREAD.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. +1 damage per [red]Suspect[/red] on self.
Apply 1 [red]Suspect[/red] to both target and self.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_GUILTY_CHAIN.title: Guilty Chain
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_GUILTY_CHAIN.descripti:
Gain 1 [b]Guilty Chain[/b].
Each turn, when you play a card targeting an enemy with [red]Suspect[/red], apply 1 [red]Suspect[/red] to a random other enemy. Triggers up to 2 times per turn.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SUSPECT_VERDICT.title: Suspect Verdict
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SUSPECT_VERDICT.descri:
Consume all [red]Suspect[/red] on target. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage per stack.
[b]Exhaust[/b]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SUSPECT_RESONANCE.desc: At the start of each turn, apply {SuspectResonancePower:diff()} [red]Suspect[/red] to all enemies.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BULLET_CARD.title: Bullet
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMALINATTACK.title: Strike
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMALINDEFEND.title: Defend
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CROSSBOWBOLT.title: Crossbow Bolt
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CROSSBOWBOLT.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target has an Attack intent, deal double damage.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BROKENLOCK.title: Broken Door Lock
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BROKENLOCK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. This damage ignores Block.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BURNTMARKS.title: Burnt Marks
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BURNTMARKS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a target. Deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NYXGUN.title: Nyx's Gun
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NYXGUN.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If Rebuttal count this turn >= 3, hit an additional enemy.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_SKETCHBOOK.title: Ann's Sketchbook
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_SKETCHBOOK.descrip: Look at the top {Cards:diff()} cards of your draw pile. Choose 1 to add to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SMALLKEY.title: Small Key
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SMALLKEY.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. The next Doubt card this turn costs 0.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HANNARECORDING.title: Hanna's Recording
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HANNARECORDING.descrip: Gain {Energy:diff()} Energy. Choose a card from your discard pile to AutoPlay.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CONTROLPANEL.title: Control Panel
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DATA.title: Data
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DATA.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. This turn, all Doubt cards cost 0.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BLOODYHEADBAND.title: Bloody Headband
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BLOODYHEADBAND.descrip: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. A random ally gains 3 Block.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_TORTURESHOWINVITE.desc: ALL allies gain {Block:diff()} Block. If Agreement count this turn >= 2, gain an additional 4 Block.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PRISONBLUEPRINT.title: Prison Blueprint
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PRISONBLUEPRINT.descri: Whenever you play an Agreement card, gain 1 Block. Allies gain 2 Block.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CANDLE.title: Candle
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CANDLE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. A random ally heals 3 HP. ALL allies gain 1 Energy.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PISTOL.title: Pistol
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PISTOL.description: A random ally gains 3 Strength. Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_REASONINGESTABLISHED.d: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each enchantment card played this turn, deal 2 additional damage.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ACCOMPLICESILENCE.desc: Gain {Energy:diff()} Energy. If you played both Agreement and Rebuttal this turn, ALL allies gain 1 Energy.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PRISONLAW.title: Prison Law
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PRISONLAW.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If you played a Doubt card this turn, +4 damage.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_FAKEDEATH.title: Fake Death
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_FAKEDEATH.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. If 3+ different enchantment types played this turn, draw 4 instead and allies heal 1 HP.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_RESTCEREMONY.title: Rest Ceremony
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_RESTCEREMONY.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each different enchantment type played this turn, +6 damage.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCHTRIAL.title: Witch Trial
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCHTRIAL.description: At the start of each turn, all Agreement/Rebuttal/Doubt enchantment counters in hand gain 1.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_INVESTIGATION.title: Investigation
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_INVESTIGATION.descript: At the start of each turn, look at the top card of your draw pile. You may discard it.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_TRUECRIMINAL.title: True Criminal
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_TRUECRIMINAL.descripti: When you consecutively play 5 Agreement/Rebuttal/Doubt cards, deal 15 unblockable damage to the lowest HP enemy.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAMLLM.title: Merruru
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAMLLM.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Give target {MllmPower:diff()} Merruru's Magic. Gain {SuspectPower:diff()} Suspect.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAMGM.title: Margaret
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAMGM.description: Gain {SuspectPower:diff()} Suspect. Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Gain {MgmPower:diff()} Margaret's Magic.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMALYM.title: Leia
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMALYM.description: Gain 4 Suspect. Give target Leia's Magic.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAXLM.title: Shirley
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAHNM.title: Hannah
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMANYXM.title: Nyx
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAKKM.title: Coco
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAKKM.description: Choose an ally, deal 1 damage. Give them {KkmPower:diff()} Coco's Magic.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMANYM.title: Noah
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMANYM.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain 1 Suspect and 10 Witchification. Give target 2 Noah's Magic.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAAMM.title: Emma
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAAMM.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} + Suspect + Witchification/20 damage. Gain 1 Suspect and 10 Witchification. Gain Emma's Magic.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAAAM.title: Arisa
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAAAM.description: Gain 3 Suspect. Choose an enemy to give Arisa's Magic.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMATEN.title: Nikaido Hiro
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMATWELVE.title: Shido Arisa
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMATWELVE.description: Remove {ConsumeAmount:diff()} Suspect from an ally. Gain {Energy:diff()} Energy. Gain {SuspectPower:diff()} Suspect. Gain 1 Shido Arisa's Magic.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAFRIEND.title: Friend
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAFRIEND.description: Gain 1 Suspect. Choose a [blue]Shirley{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/blue] or [green]Hannah{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/green] to add to your hand.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ENCHANT_TRANSFORM.desc: Choose a hand card to gain Replay. If [blue]Rebuttal[/blue] count >= 3 this turn, choose a hand card to read its keyword, then choose any number of cards with the same keyword from draw/hand/discard piles to transform into cards from your character pool with the same keyword.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ENCHANT_TRANSFORM.repl: Choose a hand card to gain Replay
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ENCHANT_TRANSFORM.keyw: Choose a card to read its keyword
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SWAPBODYSUCCESS.title: Substitute's Tenderness
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SWAPBODYSUCCESS.descri: Affinity +1. Gain a random 0-cost card. If Affinity > Estrangement, gain an additional random 0-cost card.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BALLOONFRAGMENTS.title: Balloon Fragments
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BALLOONFRAGMENTS.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Estrangement +1. If Estrangement > Affinity, apply 2 Weak. Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_GUARDIANOATH.title: Guardian's Oath
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_GUARDIANOATH.descripti: Affinity +1. Apply 3 Arisa's Magic to a random target. If target is ally: gain 1 Energy, if Affinity > Estrangement heal 1 HP. If target is enemy: apply 1 Vulnerable.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_STEPPINGBACK.title: Stepping Back Gently
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_STEPPINGBACK.descripti: Estrangement +1. Apply 3 Arisa's Magic to a random target. If target is ally: gain 1 Energy. If target is enemy: apply 1 Vulnerable.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SHAREDFATE.title: Resonance of Fate
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SHAREDFATE.description: Affinity +1. Gain 5 Shirley's Magic. If Affinity > Estrangement, all allies gain 5 Strength.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CRACKEDMIRROR.title: Cracked Mirror
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CRACKEDMIRROR.descript: Estrangement +1. Gain 5 Shirley's Magic. If Estrangement > Affinity, all enemies lose 5 Strength.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DOLLGIFT.title: Doll's Gift
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DOLLGIFT.description: Affinity +1. Gain 1 Intangible. If Affinity > Estrangement, all allies also gain 1 Intangible.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_STABBINGBLADE.title: Stabbing Blade
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_STABBINGBLADE.descript: Estrangement +1. Choose an Attack card to enchant with Witchification. If Estrangement > Affinity, play it immediately.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SHATTEREDRESONANCE.des: Estrangement +1. Gain 1 Hannah's Magic. All enemies gain 5 Strength. If Estrangement > Affinity, all enemies lose 10 Strength.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCHCLEANSING.title: Witch Cleansing
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCHCLEANSING.descrip: Estrangement +1. Deal 5 damage to yourself. Remove a quarter of Witchification from all allies. If Estrangement > Affinity, removed Witchification transfers to yourself.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_THEONLYCLUE.title: The Only Clue
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_THEONLYCLUE.descriptio: Affinity +1. Gain 2 Nyx's Magic, draw 2 cards then discard 1. If Affinity > Estrangement, discarded card gains Replay.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CHAINEDTRUST.title: Chained Trust
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CHAINEDTRUST.descripti: Estrangement +1. Gain 1 Nyx's Magic, retrieve 1 card from discard pile. If Estrangement > Affinity, randomly play 1 Attack card from deck.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SUBSTITUTECOST.title: Substitute's Cost
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SUBSTITUTECOST.descrip: Affinity +1. Gain Merruru's Magic. This turn all Attack cards deal +X damage (X = Affinity). Lose 2 Energy next turn. If Affinity > Estrangement, gain 1 Energy next turn.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PAWNREALIZATION.title: Pawn's Realization
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PAWNREALIZATION.descri: Estrangement +1. Gain Merruru's Magic. Deal damage to yourself equal to Estrangement. Gain Block equal to Estrangement×2. If Estrangement > Affinity, gain 1 extra Merruru's Magic.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NOAHAFFINITY.title: Water Cocoon
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NOAHAFFINITY.descripti: Affinity +1. Attack any enemy equal to Affinity times. If Affinity > Estrangement, first randomly give an enemy Noah's Magic, then attack.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NOAHESTRANGEMENT.title: Silent Butterfly Fall
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NOAHESTRANGEMENT.descr: Estrangement +1. Choose a hand card to gain Replay, discard a hand card. If Estrangement > Affinity, gain 1 Crimson Butterfly.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_MARGARETAFFINITY.title: Shield Substitute
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_MARGARETAFFINITY.descr: Affinity +1. Gain Margaret's Magic. This turn, take damage for your ally. Next turn, give the chosen ally Block equal to damage taken. If Affinity > Estrangement, you also gain Block equal to damage taken.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_MARGARETESTRANGEMENT.d: Estrangement +1. Gain Margaret's Magic. Choose an ally's deck to copy a card into your hand. If Estrangement > Affinity, the copied card can be played for free once.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_COCOAFFINITY.title: Recognized Gaze
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_COCOAFFINITY.descripti:
Affinity +1. Gain Coco's Magic. View all enemies' intents.
Attack intent: All allies gain 30 Hardened Shell
Defend/Buff intent: Gain 9 Ritual
Debuff intent: All allies gain 5 Artifact
If Affinity > Estrangement, randomly gain one additional intent effect.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_COCOESTRANGEMENT.title: Overlooking Gaze
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_COCOESTRANGEMENT.descr:
Estrangement +1. Gain Coco's Magic. Apply debuffs based on target's intent.
Attack intent: Shrink
Defend/Buff intent: Weak
Debuff intent: Weak + Vulnerable
If Estrangement > Affinity, all effects affect all enemies.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_AFFINITY.title: Chasing That Person
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_AFFINITY.descripti: Affinity +1. Choose a card from deck, randomly change its cost to 0-2. If Affinity > Estrangement, cost becomes 0.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_ESTRANGEMENT.title: Deadly Brainwash
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_ESTRANGEMENT.descr: Estrangement +1. Apply 2 Weak and 2 Frail to target. If Estrangement ≥ Affinity, deal Estrangement×2 damage to that enemy.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMASUSPECTSPREAD.title: Suspect Spread
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMASUSPECTSPREAD.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. +1 damage per [b]Suspect[/b] on self. Apply 1 Suspect to target and self.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMATWO.title: Prior Suspect
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMASEVEN.title: Accomplice
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMASEVEN.description: Give an ally 3 copies of Prior Suspect{IfUpgraded:show:+|}.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMATHREE.title: Reverse Witchification
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMATHREE.description: Reduce an ally's [b]Witchification[/b] by {Reduction:diff()}. Draw {Draw:diff()} cards.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_ONE.title: Bone-Corroding Suspicion
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_ONE.description: Apply {SuspectPower:diff()} [b]Suspect[/b] and Weak to an enemy.
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_EIGHT.title: Absolution
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_GUILTY_CHAIN.title: Guilty Chain
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_GUILTY_CHAIN.descr: Each turn, when you play a card targeting an enemy with [red]Suspect[/red], apply 1 [red]Suspect[/red] to a random other enemy. Max 2 triggers per turn.
